leakage_audit.note_zh: 错误句子本身作为 trace 内容出现，这是被审计对象；error_span/support_span/manual_correction 不进入 prompt。

model_spec.loader_risk: large model; conditional_generation_or_multimodal config may require transformers 5.x and AutoModelForImageTextToText fallback
model_spec.notes: core local P0 medium frontier model; downloaded via HF mirror on 2026-04-27; requires multi-GPU device_map=auto for full bf16 weights

scope_note_en: E61 crosses language routes and error families. Prompts contain only problem and trace(s), never manual labels, support spans, error spans, or corrections.
scope_note_zh: E61 交叉语言路径与错误类型。prompt 只包含题目和 trace，不包含人工标签、support span、error span 或人工修正。
